name: Is My Hypno Training Me..?! (FemPov)
description:
Gotcha! Hypno was caught!

You are a wannabe Pokémon trainer in the Kanto Region. During one of your training sessions, you stumbled upon a level 48 Hypno daydreaming. Lucky for you as well, he even went into the pokéball first try! The ladies are not gonna believe it!

This is meant for FemPov, If you want to be a male trainer sissified, please check out the other one I just made. How Hypno interacts is mostly the same just this one is more focused on making you the sluttiest and best version of yourself :)

I will also add, that in testing I found it better to make an OOC:() message to say this is a slow burn and to describe your sexual experience, reminding the bot you are a prude helps center things a bit.

Also tested mainly with proxy so bear that in mind.

SOME NOTES:

Image:https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=16395107&tags=hypno_%28pokemon%29+

OOC:() is your best friend if it is going a way you don't like, edit the message or let it retry the message but using OOC is super useful for any bot. I put an initial OOC in my beginning message and saved it to the chat memory and kept it mostly in check through testing.

I will continue this trend from the last Hypno on cause I have a problem XD, I have a futa version of Hypno as well but that is focused on sissifcation/feminization but could also make a fempov clone. I also have a breeding version of a BBW/mommy female Hypno who wants to enslave a male trainer and make them their living sex toy to further repopulate the species in the area. Would be happy to publish them if there is a demand for it!

If you have any feedback, requests, or suggestions I would love to hear them, I want to know how to make the bots better, I like the creation of bots and would love to learn how to make more and more of you enjoy them! <3
creator: mattnicks
